get.summary: Get all contextual data integrations accessible
get.description:
Returns all contextual data integrations for the team.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:ReadConfig`

parameters.name: include_testing_integrations
parameters.description: Whether to include testing integrations in the results.

schema.description: Whether to include testing integrations in the results.

put.description:
Updates an existing contextual data integration.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:UpdateConfig`

schema.title: Update contextual data integration request
schema.description: Request for updating a contextual data integration.

integrationId.description: ID of the contextual data integration to update.

post.description:
Creates a new contextual data integration.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:UpdateConfig`

schema.title: Save contextual data integration request
schema.description: Request for creating a contextual data integration.

get.description:
Returns the definition for the specified contextual data integration type.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:ReadConfig`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration definition.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration definition.

parameters.name: include_testing_integrations
parameters.description: Whether to include testing integrations in the results.

schema.description: Whether to include testing integrations in the results.

post.description:
Tests the specified contextual data integration.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:UpdateConfig`

parameters.name: integration_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration to test.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration to test.

schema.title: Test contextual data integration request
schema.description: Request for testing a contextual data integration.

get.description:
Returns the details of the specified contextual data integration.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:ReadConfig`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the contextual data integration.

parameters.name: include_testing_revisions
parameters.description: Whether to include testing revisions in the results.

schema.description: Whether to include testing revisions in the results.

delete.description:
Deletes the specified contextual data integration.

Requires the following permissions:
- `contextual-data:UpdateConfig`

externalDocs.description: Find out more about the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) integration in our documentation

ARMStack.title: ARM stack
ARMStack.description: This data structure represents an Azure Resource Manager stack.

AzureArm.title: Azure ARM
AzureArm.description: This data structure represents an Azure ARM integration.

AzureArmTemplate.title: Azure ARM template
AzureArmTemplate.description: This data structure represents an azure ARM template.

externalDocs.description: Find out more about the AWS CloudFormation integration in our documentation

CloudFormationStack.title: CloudFormation stack
CloudFormationStack.description: This data structure represents a CloudFormation stack.

Cloudformation.title: CloudFormation
Cloudformation.description: This data structure represents a CloudFormation integration.

ContextualData.title: Contextual data
ContextualData.description: This data structure represents a contextual data integration.

DeleteContextualDataIntegrationResponse.title: Delete contextual data integration response
DeleteContextualDataIntegrationResponse.description: Response returned after successfully deleting a contextual data integration.

Error.description: Standard error response body returned for a failed request.

code.description: HTTP status code of the error (for example 400, 404, 500).

ExtensionBinary.BinaryType.description: Type of binary content stored in the extension.

allowedPattern.description: Regular expression pattern that the field value must match for validation.

documentationReference.description: Link to documentation providing more information about this field.

groupId.description: Identifier of the UI group this field belongs to for form layout purposes.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in the input field before a value is entered.

predefined.description: Whether this field has a predefined value that is suggested to the user.

readonly.description: Whether this field is read-only and cannot be modified by the user.

required.description: Whether this field must be filled in before the integration can be deployed.

templateParamName.description: Name of the template parameter this field maps to in the deployment template.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text displayed on hover to provide additional context for this field.

upgradeNotice.description: Notice displayed to users when an upgrade is required to use this field.

visible.description: Whether this field is visible in the integration configuration UI.

FilterPathAndValues.title: FilterPathAndValues
FilterPathAndValues.description: This data structure represents a filter path and values

Filters.title: Filters
Filters.description: This data structure represents a filter

GenericWebhook.title: Generic webhook
GenericWebhook.description: This data structure represents a generic webhook integration.

GetContextualDataIntegrationDefinitionRe.title: Get contextual data integration definition response
GetContextualDataIntegrationDefinitionRe.description: Response containing the definition of a contextual data integration type.

GetContextualDataIntegrationDetailsRespo.title: Get contextual data integration details response
GetContextualDataIntegrationDetailsRespo.description: Response containing the details of a contextual data integration.

GetContextualDataIntegrationsResponse.title: Get contextual data integrations response
GetContextualDataIntegrationsResponse.description: Response containing a list of contextual data integrations.

HelmChart.title: Helm chart
HelmChart.description: This data structure represents a Helm chart.

Integration.title: Integration
Integration.description: This data structure represents an integration

IntegrationDefinition.title: Integration definition
IntegrationDefinition.description: This data structure represents a definition of an integration.

IntegrationDetails.title: Integration details
IntegrationDetails.description: This data structure represents a set of integration details.

docs.description: Documentation links associated with this integration.

extensions.description: Extensions bundled with this integration for pre-built dashboards and alerts.

IntegrationDoc.title: Integration doc
IntegrationDoc.description: This data structure represents integration documentation.

IntegrationMetadata.title: Integration metadata
IntegrationMetadata.description: This data structure represents the metadata of an integration.

IntegrationRevision.title: Integration revision
IntegrationRevision.description: This data structure represents an integration revision.

fields.description: Configuration fields that users must fill in to deploy this integration revision.

groups.description: UI groups used to organize configuration fields into logical sections.

revisionDeploymentSupported.description: Whether this revision supports automated deployment through the Coralogix platform.

upgradeInstructionsMd.description: Markdown-formatted upgrade instructions shown when upgrading from a previous revision.

IntegrationStatus.title: Integration status
IntegrationStatus.description: This data structure represents an integration status.

Managed.title: Managed
Managed.description: This data structure represents a managed integration.

ManagedService.title: Managed service
ManagedService.description: This data structure represents a managed service.

NoDeployment.title: No deployment
NoDeployment.description: This data structure represents an integration that does not require deployment.

booleanValue.description: Boolean value for this integration parameter.

numericValue.description: Numeric value for this integration parameter.

stringValue.description: String value for this integration parameter.

PushBasedContextualData.title: Push based contextual data
PushBasedContextualData.description: This data structure represents a push based contextual data integration.

isTesting.description: Whether this is a testing instance used for validation purposes only.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to this integration instance.

Rum.title: RUM
Rum.description: This data structure represents a RUM integration.

SaveContextualDataIntegrationResponse.title: Save contextual data integration response
SaveContextualDataIntegrationResponse.description: Response returned after successfully saving a contextual data integration.

Terraform.title: Terraform
Terraform.description: This data structure represents a Terraform integration.

TestContextualDataIntegrationResponse.title: Test contextual data integration response
TestContextualDataIntegrationResponse.description: Response containing the results of a contextual data integration test.

Untracked.title: Untracked
Untracked.description: This data structure represents an untracked integration.

UpdateContextualDataIntegrationResponse.title: Update contextual data integration response
UpdateContextualDataIntegrationResponse.description: Response returned after successfully updating a contextual data integration.

v1.Extension.title: Extension metadata
v1.Extension.description: Represents a Coralogix extension package containing pre-built resources.

v1.IntegrationType.title: Integration type
v1.IntegrationType.description: This data structure represents an integration type.
